mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.club_name AS club_name, c.category, c.instructor_name AS instructor_name, c.purpose, c.established_date AS established_date, COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') AS recruit_status, c.recruit_start_at AS recruit_start_at, c.recruit_end_at AS recruit_end_at, c.recruit_limit AS recruit_limit, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` cm_count WHERE cm_count.club_id = c.id AND cm_count.member_status = 1 AND cm_count.is_deleted = 0 ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_join_apply` cja_count WHERE cja_count.club_id = c.id AND cja_count.join_status = 1 AND cja_count.is_deleted = 0 ) AS signed_up_count, CASE WHEN cm_self.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'JOINED' WHEN cja.join_status = 1 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN cja.join_status = 3 THEN 'REJECTED' ELSE 'NONE' END AS join_status, CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') = 'OPEN' AND c.recruit_start_at IS NOT NULL AND c.recruit_end_at IS NOT NULL AND NOW() BETWEEN c.recruit_start_at AND c.recruit_end_at THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_recruiting, CASE WHEN COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') != 'OPEN' THEN FALSE WHEN c.recruit_start_at IS NULL OR c.recruit_end_at IS NULL THEN FALSE WHEN NOW() < c.recruit_start_at THEN FALSE WHEN NOW() > c.recruit_end_at THEN FALSE WHEN cm_self.id IS NOT NULL THEN FALSE WHEN cja.join_status = 1 THEN FALSE WHEN c.recruit_limit IS NOT NULL AND c.recruit_limit <= ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.club_id = c.id AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ) + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_join_apply` cja_pending WHERE cja_pending.club_id = c.id AND cja_pending.join_status = 1 AND cja_pending.is_deleted = 0 ) THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS join_entry_enabled, 'ACTIVE' AS status FROM `club` c LEFT JOIN `club_join_apply` cja ON cja.id = ( SELECT cja2.id FROM `club_join_apply` cja2 WHERE cja2.club_id = c.id AND cja2.user_id = #{userId} AND cja2.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cja2.created_at DESC, cja2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN `club_member` cm_self ON cm_self.club_id = c.id AND cm_self.user_id = #{userId} AND cm_self.member_status = 1 AND cm_self.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = #{clubStatus} AND NOT ( cm_self.id IS NOT NULL AND ( COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') != 'OPEN' OR c.recruit_start_at IS NULL OR c.recruit_end_at IS NULL OR NOW() NOT BETWEEN c.recruit_start_at AND c.recruit_end_at ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `club_apply` ca WHERE ca.club_id = c.id AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.apply_status = #{applyStatus} )
AND c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.category = #{category}
AND COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') = 'OPEN' AND c.recruit_start_at IS NOT NULL AND c.recruit_end_at IS NOT NULL AND NOW() BETWEEN c.recruit_start_at AND c.recruit_end_at
AND ( COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') != 'OPEN' OR c.recruit_start_at IS NULL OR c.recruit_end_at IS NULL OR NOW() < c.recruit_start_at OR NOW() > c.recruit_end_at )
ORDER BY c.updated_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` c LEFT JOIN `club_member` cm_self ON cm_self.club_id = c.id AND cm_self.user_id = #{userId} AND cm_self.member_status = 1 AND cm_self.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = #{clubStatus} AND NOT ( cm_self.id IS NOT NULL AND ( COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') != 'OPEN' OR c.recruit_start_at IS NULL OR c.recruit_end_at IS NULL OR NOW() NOT BETWEEN c.recruit_start_at AND c.recruit_end_at ) )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `club_apply` ca WHERE ca.club_id = c.id AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.apply_status = #{applyStatus} )
AND c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND c.category = #{category}
AND COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') = 'OPEN' AND c.recruit_start_at IS NOT NULL AND c.recruit_end_at IS NOT NULL AND NOW() BETWEEN c.recruit_start_at AND c.recruit_end_at
AND ( COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') != 'OPEN' OR c.recruit_start_at IS NULL OR c.recruit_end_at IS NULL OR NOW() < c.recruit_start_at OR NOW() > c.recruit_end_at )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` WHERE club_name = #{clubName} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, ca.apply_status AS apply_status, ca.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_apply` ca JOIN `club` c ON c.id = ca.club_id WHERE ca.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.initiator_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_apply` ca JOIN `club` c ON c.id = ca.club_id WHERE ca.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.initiator_user_id = #{userId}

SELECT cc.id, cc.club_id AS club_id, cc.apply_type AS apply_type, cc.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cc.asset_settlement_url AS asset_settlement_url, cc.cancel_status AS cancel_status, cc.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_cancel` cc WHERE cc.club_id = #{clubId} AND cc.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cc.created_at DESC, cc.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT cc.id, cc.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, u.real_name AS initiator_real_name, cc.apply_type AS apply_type, cc.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cc.asset_settlement_url AS asset_settlement_url, cc.cancel_status AS cancel_status, cc.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_cancel` cc JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cc.club_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cc.created_by WHERE cc.club_id = #{clubId} AND cc.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cc.created_at DESC, cc.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_cancel` cc WHERE cc.club_id = #{clubId} AND cc.is_deleted = 0
SELECT status FROM `club` WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') AS recruit_status, c.recruit_start_at AS recruit_start_at, c.recruit_end_at AS recruit_end_at, c.recruit_limit AS recruit_limit, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.club_id = c.id AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ) AS active_member_count, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_join_apply` cja WHERE cja.club_id = c.id AND cja.join_status = 1 AND cja.is_deleted = 0 ) AS pending_apply_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `club_apply` ca WHERE ca.club_id = c.id AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.apply_status = #{approvedStatus} ) AS approved FROM `club` c WHERE c.id = #{clubId} AND c.status = #{clubStatus} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT cja.join_status FROM `club_join_apply` cja WHERE cja.club_id = #{clubId} AND cja.user_id = #{userId} AND cja.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cja.created_at DESC, cja.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT cja.id FROM `club_join_apply` cja WHERE cja.club_id = #{clubId} AND cja.user_id = #{userId} AND cja.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cja.created_at DESC, cja.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `club_join_apply` SET join_status = 1, self_intro = #{selfIntro}, apply_reason = #{applyReason}, reject_reason = NULL, review_user_id = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{applyId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT cja.id, cja.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, CASE WHEN cja.join_status = 1 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN cja.join_status = 2 THEN 'JOINED' WHEN cja.join_status = 3 THEN 'REJECTED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS join_status, cja.self_intro AS self_intro, cja.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cja.reject_reason AS reject_reason, cja.created_at AS created_at, cja.reviewed_at AS reviewed_at, cp.position_name AS position_name, CASE WHEN cm.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_active_member FROM `club_join_apply` cja JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cja.club_id LEFT JOIN `club_member` cm ON cm.club_id = cja.club_id AND cm.user_id = cja.user_id AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `club_position` cp ON cp.id = cm.position_id AND cp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cja.user_id = #{userId} AND cja.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status != 5 ORDER BY cja.created_at DESC, cja.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_join_apply` cja JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cja.club_id WHERE cja.user_id = #{userId} AND cja.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status != 5

SELECT cja.id, cja.club_id AS club_id, cja.user_id AS user_id, cja.join_status AS join_status, cja.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cja.reject_reason AS reject_reason, cja.review_user_id AS review_user_id, cja.created_at AS created_at, cja.reviewed_at AS reviewed_at FROM `club_join_apply` cja WHERE cja.id = #{applyId} AND cja.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE `club_join_apply` SET join_status = #{joinStatus}, review_user_id = #{reviewUserId}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{applyId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT e.id, c.club_name AS club_name, e.title, e.content, e.location, e.start_at AS start_at, e.end_at AS end_at, e.signup_start_at AS signup_start_at, e.signup_end_at AS signup_end_at, e.limit_count AS limit_count, e.only_member AS only_member, GREATEST(e.limit_count - IFNULL(s.signed_count, 0), 0) AS remaining_slots, e.event_status AS event_status, es_self.signup_status AS signup_status, CASE WHEN ec_self.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS checked_in FROM `event` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT es.event_id, COUNT(1) AS signed_count FROM `event_signup` es WHERE es.is_deleted = 0 AND es.signup_status = 1 GROUP BY es.event_id ) s ON s.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN `event_signup` es_self ON es_self.event_id = e.id AND es_self.user_id = #{userId} AND es_self.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `event_checkin` ec_self ON ec_self.event_id = e.id AND ec_self.user_id = #{userId} AND ec_self.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND (e.event_status IN (3, 6) OR (es_self.signup_status = 1 AND e.event_status IN (3, 4, 6)))
AND (e.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND e.club_id IN ( SELECT cm.club_id FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 )
ORDER BY e.start_at ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `event_signup` es_self ON es_self.event_id = e.id AND es_self.user_id = #{userId} AND es_self.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND (e.event_status IN (3, 6) OR (es_self.signup_status = 1 AND e.event_status IN (3, 4, 6)))
AND (e.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND e.club_id IN ( SELECT cm.club_id FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 )
SELECT e.id, e.club_id, e.limit_count, e.only_member, e.event_status, e.signup_start_at, e.signup_end_at FROM `event` e WHERE e.id = #{eventId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event_signup` WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND signup_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT limit_count FROM `event` WHERE id = #{eventId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT ur.club_id FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_code = 'CLUB_ADMIN' AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.club_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ur.id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, club_name, category, description AS introduction, purpose, instructor_name FROM `club` WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id AS club_id, c.recruit_start_at AS recruit_start_at, c.recruit_end_at AS recruit_end_at, c.recruit_limit AS recruit_limit, COALESCE(c.recruit_status, 'CLOSED') AS recruit_status, c.updated_at AS updated_at FROM `club` c WHERE c.id = #{clubId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `club` SET club_name = #{clubName}, category = #{category}, description = #{introduction}, purpose = #{purpose}, instructor_name = #{instructorName}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE `club` SET recruit_start_at = #{recruitStartAt}, recruit_end_at = #{recruitEndAt}, recruit_limit = #{recruitLimit}, recruit_status = #{recruitStatus}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT cp.id, cp.club_id, cp.position_name, cp.parent_position_id, cp.level_no, cp.sort_no, cp.created_at FROM `club_position` cp WHERE cp.club_id = #{clubId} AND cp.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cp.level_no ASC, cp.sort_no ASC, cp.id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_position` cp WHERE cp.club_id = #{clubId} AND cp.is_deleted = 0

SELECT cp.id, cp.club_id, cp.position_name, cp.parent_position_id, cp.level_no, cp.sort_no, cp.created_at FROM `club_position` cp WHERE cp.club_id = #{clubId} AND cp.id = #{positionId} AND cp.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT cm.id, cm.club_id, cm.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, cm.position_id, cp.position_name, cm.member_status, cm.join_at, cm.quit_at, cm.contribution_score FROM `club_member` cm JOIN `user` u ON cm.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `club_position` cp ON cp.id = cm.position_id AND cp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cm.club_id = #{clubId} AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1 ORDER BY cm.join_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.club_id = #{clubId} AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT i.id, 'INCOME' AS type, '收入' AS type_name, i.amount, 'APPROVED' AS status, i.occur_at FROM `income` i WHERE i.club_id = #{clubId} AND i.is_deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT e.id, 'EXPENSE' AS type, '支出' AS type_name, e.amount, CASE WHEN e.expense_status = 1 THEN 'PENDING' WHEN e.expense_status = 2 THEN 'APPROVED' WHEN e.expense_status = 3 THEN 'REJECTED' WHEN e.expense_status = 4 THEN 'PAID' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS status, e.created_at AS occur_at FROM `expense` e WHERE e.club_id = #{clubId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 ) t ORDER BY t.occur_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `income` i WHERE i.club_id = #{clubId} AND i.is_deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `expense` e WHERE e.club_id = #{clubId} AND e.is_deleted = 0) )

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, ( SELECT r.role_code FROM `user_role` ur2 JOIN `role` r ON ur2.role_id = r.id WHERE ur2.user_id = u.id AND ur2.status = 1 AND ur2.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur2.updated_at DESC, ur2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS role_code, CASE WHEN u.graduate_at IS NOT NULL AND u.graduate_at <= NOW() THEN 'GRADUATED' WHEN u.status = 1 THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN u.status = 2 THEN 'FROZEN' WHEN u.status = 3 THEN 'CANCELED' ELSE 'CANCELED' END AS status, u.graduate_at FROM `user` u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{dbStatus}
AND u.graduate_at IS NOT NULL AND u.graduate_at <= NOW()
AND (u.graduate_at IS NULL OR u.graduate_at > NOW())
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = #{roleCode} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.user_id = u.id AND cm.club_id = #{clubId} AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1 )
ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND u.status = #{dbStatus}
AND u.graduate_at IS NOT NULL AND u.graduate_at <= NOW()
AND (u.graduate_at IS NULL OR u.graduate_at > NOW())
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = #{roleCode} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.user_id = u.id AND cm.club_id = #{clubId} AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1 )
SELECT status FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `role` WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT r.role_code FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ur.updated_at DESC, ur.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM `user_role` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `user_role` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `user_role` SET role_id = #{roleId}, club_id = #{clubId}, status = 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT club_id FROM `club_member` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY join_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id, ca.initiator_user_id, c.club_name, ca.apply_status, u.real_name AS initiator_real_name, ca.created_at FROM `club_apply` ca JOIN `club` c ON c.id = ca.club_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = ca.initiator_user_id WHERE ca.id = #{approvalId} AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, c.category AS category, ca.apply_status AS apply_status, u.real_name AS initiator_real_name, COALESCE(ca.instructor_name, c.instructor_name) AS instructor_name, c.purpose AS purpose, ca.remark AS remark, ca.charter_url AS charter_url, ca.instructor_proof_url AS instructor_proof_url, ca.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_apply` ca JOIN `club` c ON c.id = ca.club_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = ca.initiator_user_id WHERE ca.id = #{approvalId} AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT cc.id, cc.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, cc.apply_type AS apply_type, cc.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cc.asset_settlement_url AS asset_settlement_url, cc.cancel_status AS cancel_status, u.real_name AS initiator_real_name, cc.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_cancel` cc JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cc.club_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cc.created_by WHERE cc.id = #{cancelId} AND cc.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT cc.id, cc.club_id AS club_id, cc.apply_type AS apply_type, cc.apply_reason AS apply_reason, cc.asset_settlement_url AS asset_settlement_url, cc.cancel_status AS cancel_status, cc.created_at AS created_at FROM `club_cancel` cc WHERE cc.id = #{cancelId} AND cc.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT ca.initiator_user_id FROM `club_apply` ca WHERE ca.club_id = #{clubId} AND ca.is_deleted = 0 AND ca.initiator_user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY (ca.apply_status = 4) DESC, ca.created_at ASC, ca.id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `club_apply` SET apply_status = #{applyStatus}, current_step = #{currentStep}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{approvalId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, c.category AS category, c.status AS status, ca.apply_status AS apply_status, u.real_name AS initiator_real_name, c.instructor_name AS instructor_name, c.purpose AS purpose, ca.charter_url AS charter_url, ca.instructor_proof_url AS instructor_proof_url, ca.created_at AS created_at FROM `club` c LEFT JOIN `club_apply` ca ON ca.id = ( SELECT ca2.id FROM `club_apply` ca2 WHERE ca2.club_id = c.id AND ca2.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY ca2.created_at DESC, ca2.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = ca.initiator_user_id WHERE c.id = #{clubId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `club` SET club_name = COALESCE(#{clubName}, club_name), category = COALESCE(#{category}, category), purpose = COALESCE(#{purpose}, purpose), instructor_name = COALESCE(#{instructorName}, instructor_name), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE `club_member` cm JOIN `user` u ON cm.user_id = u.id SET cm.member_status = 2, cm.quit_at = #{now}, cm.updated_at = #{now} WHERE cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.graduate_at IS NOT NULL AND u.graduate_at <= #{now}

UPDATE `user` u JOIN `user_role` ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id SET u.status = 2, u.updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE ur.club_id = #{clubId} AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = 'CLUB_ADMIN' AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1

UPDATE `user` u JOIN `user_role` ur ON ur.user_id = u.id JOIN `role` r ON ur.role_id = r.id JOIN `club` c ON ur.club_id = c.id SET u.status = 2, u.updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE c.status = 5 AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.status = 1 AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND r.role_code = 'CLUB_ADMIN' AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.status != 2
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` u WHERE u.is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `expense` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND ((amount > 500 AND approve_level = 1) OR invoice_url IS NULL OR invoice_url = '')
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(start_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(start_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cm.user_id) FROM `club_member` cm WHERE cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND member_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT amount FROM `expense` WHERE id = #{expenseId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `event` ( id, club_id, title, content, location, start_at, end_at, signup_start_at, signup_end_at, limit_count, only_member, event_status, safety_plan_url, checkin_code, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{clubId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{location}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{signupStartAt}, #{signupEndAt}, #{limitCount}, #{onlyMember}, #{eventStatus}, #{safetyPlanUrl}, #{checkinCode}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE `event` SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, location = #{location}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, signup_start_at = #{signupStartAt}, signup_end_at = #{signupEndAt}, limit_count = #{limitCount}, only_member = #{onlyMember}, safety_plan_url = #{safetyPlanUrl}, checkin_code = #{checkinCode}, event_status = 2, reject_reason = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{eventId} AND club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.club_id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, e.title, e.content, e.location, e.start_at AS start_at, e.end_at AS end_at, e.signup_start_at AS signup_start_at, e.signup_end_at AS signup_end_at, e.limit_count AS limit_count, e.only_member AS only_member, e.event_status AS event_status, e.safety_plan_url AS safety_plan_url, e.checkin_code AS checkin_code, e.reject_reason AS reject_reason, IFNULL(s.cnt, 0) AS signup_count, IFNULL(ck.cnt, 0) AS checkin_count, e.created_at AS created_at, e.updated_at AS updated_at FROM `event` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT event_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `event_signup` WHERE signup_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY event_id) s ON s.event_id = e.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT event_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `event_checkin` WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY event_id) ck ON ck.event_id = e.id WHERE e.id = #{eventId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, club_id AS club_id, event_status AS event_status, start_at AS start_at, end_at AS end_at FROM `event` WHERE id = #{eventId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `event` WHERE checkin_code = #{checkinCode} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM `event` WHERE id = #{eventId} AND checkin_code = #{checkinCode} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `event` SET event_status = #{eventStatus}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{eventId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE `event` SET checkin_code = #{checkinCode}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{eventId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT es.id, es.user_id AS user_id, u.real_name AS real_name, u.student_no AS student_no, es.signup_status AS signup_status, es.signup_at AS signup_at, CASE WHEN ec.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS checked_in, ec.checkin_at AS checkin_at FROM `event_signup` es JOIN `user` u ON u.id = es.user_id LEFT JOIN `event_checkin` ec ON ec.event_id = es.event_id AND ec.user_id = es.user_id AND ec.is_deleted = 0 WHERE es.event_id = #{eventId} AND es.is_deleted = 0 AND es.signup_status = 1 ORDER BY es.signup_at ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event_signup` WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND signup_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `event_checkin` ( id, event_id, user_id, checkin_type, checkin_at, device_no, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{userId}, #{checkinType}, #{checkinAt}, #{deviceNo}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event_checkin` WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE `event_checkin` SET is_deleted = 0, checkin_type = #{checkinType}, checkin_at = #{checkinAt}, device_no = #{deviceNo}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.select: SELECT es.id, es.event_id AS eventId, e.title AS eventTitle, c.club_name AS clubName, es.summary_text AS summaryText, es.summary_images AS summaryImagesJson, es.feedback_score AS feedbackScore, es.issue_reflection AS issueReflection, es.attachment_url AS attachmentUrl, es.created_at AS createdAt FROM `event_summary` es JOIN `event` e ON e.id = es.event_id JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id WHERE es.event_id = #{eventId} AND es.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `event_summary` ( id, event_id, summary_text, summary_images, feedback_score, issue_reflection, attachment_url, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{eventId}, #{summaryText}, #{summaryImages}, #{feedbackScore}, #{issueReflection}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE `event_summary` SET summary_text = #{summaryText}, summary_images = #{summaryImages}, feedback_score = #{feedbackScore}, issue_reflection = #{issueReflection}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event_summary` es JOIN `event` e ON e.id = es.event_id AND e.is_deleted = 0
JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id
WHERE es.is_deleted = 0
AND (e.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT c.id AS club_id, c.club_name AS club_name, c.category, c.purpose, cp.position_name AS position_name, cm.join_at AS join_at FROM `club_member` cm JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cm.club_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN `club_position` cp ON cp.id = cm.position_id AND cp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status != 5 ORDER BY cm.join_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_member` cm JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cm.club_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status != 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `income` ( id, club_id, income_type, amount, occur_at, proof_url, source_desc, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{clubId}, #{incomeType}, #{amount}, #{occurAt}, #{proofUrl}, #{sourceDesc}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.club_id, i.income_type, CASE WHEN i.income_type = 1 THEN '学校拨款' WHEN i.income_type = 2 THEN '赞助收入' WHEN i.income_type = 3 THEN '成员会费' ELSE '其他' END AS income_type_name, i.amount, i.occur_at, i.proof_url, i.source_desc, i.created_at FROM `income` i WHERE i.club_id = #{clubId} AND i.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY i.occur_at DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `income` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `expense` ( id, club_id, event_id, category, amount, payee_name, payee_account, invoice_url, expense_desc, approve_level, expense_status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{clubId}, #{eventId}, #{category}, #{amount}, #{payeeName}, #{payeeAccount}, #{invoiceUrl}, #{expenseDesc}, #{approveLevel}, #{expenseStatus}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.club_id, c.club_name, e.event_id, e.category, e.amount, e.payee_name, e.payee_account, e.invoice_url, e.expense_desc, e.approve_level, e.expense_status, e.reject_reason, u.real_name AS created_by_name, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM `expense` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = e.created_by WHERE e.id = #{expenseId} AND e.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE `expense` SET expense_status = #{expenseStatus}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{expenseId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE `expense` SET category = #{category}, amount = #{amount}, payee_name = #{payeeName}, payee_account = #{payeeAccount}, invoice_url = #{invoiceUrl}, expense_desc = #{expenseDesc}, approve_level = #{approveLevel}, expense_status = #{expenseStatus}, reject_reason = NULL, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{expenseId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status = 3
mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM `expense` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND expense_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
AND id != #{excludeExpenseId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `expense` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id WHERE e.approve_level = 2 AND e.expense_status = 1 AND e.is_deleted = 0 AND c.is_deleted = 0
AND (c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.expense_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `ledger` ( id, club_id, biz_type, biz_id, change_amount, balance_after, occur_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{clubId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{changeAmount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{occurAt}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT balance_after FROM `ledger` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM `income` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM `expense` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status = 2 AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year}

SELECT MONTH(occur_at) AS month, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS income, 0 AS expense FROM `income` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(occur_at) ORDER BY month

SELECT MONTH(created_at) AS month, 0 AS income, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS expense FROM `expense` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status = 2 AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(created_at) ORDER BY month

SELECT COALESCE(category, '未分类') AS category, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM `expense` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status = 2 AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amount DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `expense` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id AND c.is_deleted = 0 WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND ((e.amount > 500 AND e.approve_level = 1) OR e.invoice_url IS NULL OR e.invoice_url = '')
AND (c.club_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.expense_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT club_name FROM `club` WHERE id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT category, COUNT(1) AS count FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (1,2,3) GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT CASE status WHEN 1 THEN '筹建' WHEN 2 THEN '正常' WHEN 3 THEN '整改/冻结' WHEN 4 THEN '待注销' WHEN 5 THEN '已注销' ELSE '未知' END AS status_name, COUNT(1) AS count FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 5 AND YEAR(updated_at) = #{year}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ur.user_id) FROM `user_role` ur JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.role_code = 'STUDENT' JOIN `user` u ON u.id = ur.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND u.status = 1 WHERE ur.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.status = 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cm.user_id) FROM `club_member` cm JOIN `user_role` ur ON ur.user_id = cm.user_id AND ur.is_deleted = 0 AND ur.status = 1 JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.role_code = 'STUDENT' WHERE cm.is_deleted = 0 AND cm.member_status = 1

SELECT c.club_name, COALESCE(m.cnt, 0) AS member_count, COALESCE(e.cnt, 0) AS event_count FROM `club` c LEFT JOIN (SELECT club_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `club_member` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND member_status = 1 GROUP BY club_id) m ON m.club_id = c.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT club_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `event` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(start_at) = #{year} AND event_status IN (3,4,6) GROUP BY club_id) e ON e.club_id = c.id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status IN (1,2,3) ORDER BY event_count DESC, member_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(start_at) = #{year} AND event_status IN (3,4,6)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event_signup` es JOIN `event` e ON e.id = es.event_id WHERE es.is_deleted = 0 AND es.signup_status = 1 AND YEAR(e.start_at) = #{year} AND e.event_status IN (3,4,6)

SELECT MONTH(e.start_at) AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS event_count, COUNT(es.id) AS signup_count FROM `event` e LEFT JOIN `event_signup` es ON es.event_id = e.id AND es.is_deleted = 0 AND es.signup_status = 1 WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(e.start_at) = #{year} AND e.event_status IN (3,4,6) GROUP BY MONTH(e.start_at) ORDER BY month

SELECT c.club_name, COUNT(e.id) AS event_count FROM `event` e JOIN `club` c ON c.id = e.club_id WHERE e.is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(e.start_at) = #{year} AND e.event_status IN (3,4,6) GROUP BY e.club_id, c.club_name ORDER BY event_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CASE event_status WHEN 1 THEN '草稿' WHEN 2 THEN '待审核' WHEN 3 THEN '报名中' WHEN 4 THEN '已结束' WHEN 5 THEN '已驳回' WHEN 6 THEN '进行中' ELSE '未知' END AS status_name, COUNT(1) AS count FROM `event` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(start_at) = #{year} GROUP BY event_status ORDER BY event_status

SELECT CASE income_type WHEN 1 THEN '学校拨款' WHEN 2 THEN '赞助收入' WHEN 3 THEN '成员会费' ELSE '其他' END AS type_name, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS amount FROM `income` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year} GROUP BY income_type ORDER BY income_type
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM `expense` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status IN (2,4) AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year}

SELECT c.club_name, COALESCE(i.total, 0) AS income, COALESCE(ex.total, 0) AS expense, COALESCE(i.total, 0) - COALESCE(ex.total, 0) AS balance, COALESCE(ev.cnt, 0) AS event_count, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ev.cnt, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(ex.total, 0) / ev.cnt, 2) ELSE 0 END AS efficiency FROM `club` c LEFT JOIN (SELECT club_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM `income` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year} GROUP BY club_id) i ON i.club_id = c.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT club_id, SUM(amount) AS total FROM `expense` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status IN (2,4) AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year} GROUP BY club_id) ex ON ex.club_id = c.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT club_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM `event` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND event_status IN (3,4,6) AND YEAR(start_at) = #{year} GROUP BY club_id) ev ON ev.club_id = c.id WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status IN (1,2,3) AND (i.total IS NOT NULL OR ex.total IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY income DESC

SELECT m.month, COALESCE(i.amount, 0) AS income, COALESCE(e.amount, 0) AS expense FROM (SELECT 1 AS month UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12) m LEFT JOIN (SELECT MONTH(occur_at) AS month, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM `income` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(occur_at)) i ON i.month = m.month LEFT JOIN (SELECT MONTH(created_at) AS month, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM `expense` WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND expense_status IN (2,4) AND YEAR(created_at) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(created_at)) e ON e.month = m.month ORDER BY m.month
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `club_review` (id, club_id, review_year, review_status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, is_deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{clubId}, #{reviewYear}, #{reviewStatus}, #{now}, #{now}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.club_id, c.club_name, cr.review_year, cr.review_status, cr.summary_text, cr.attachment_url, cr.score, cr.reject_reason, cr.total_income, cr.total_expense, cr.balance, cr.member_count, cr.event_count, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at FROM `club_review` cr JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cr.club_id WHERE cr.id = #{reviewId} AND cr.is_deleted = 0

SELECT cr.id, cr.club_id, c.club_name, cr.review_year, cr.review_status, cr.summary_text, cr.attachment_url, cr.score, cr.reject_reason, cr.total_income, cr.total_expense, cr.balance, cr.member_count, cr.event_count, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at FROM `club_review` cr JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cr.club_id WHERE cr.club_id = #{clubId} AND cr.review_year = #{reviewYear} AND cr.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE `club_review` SET summary_text = #{summaryText}, attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, total_income = #{totalIncome}, total_expense = #{totalExpense}, balance = #{balance}, member_count = #{memberCount}, event_count = #{eventCount}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE `club_review` SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, score = #{score}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{now}, updated_at = #{now} WHERE id = #{reviewId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT cr.id, cr.club_id, c.club_name, cr.review_year, cr.review_status, cr.score, cr.reject_reason, cr.created_at, cr.updated_at FROM `club_review` cr JOIN `club` c ON c.id = cr.club_id WHERE cr.club_id = #{clubId} AND cr.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cr.review_year DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_review` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM `club` WHERE status = 2 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_review` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND review_year = #{reviewYear} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, review_status AS reviewStatus, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM `club_review` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND review_year = #{reviewYear} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `event` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND YEAR(start_at) = #{year} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT id, club_id, income_type, CASE WHEN income_type = 1 THEN '学校拨款' WHEN income_type = 2 THEN '赞助' WHEN income_type = 3 THEN '会费' ELSE '其他' END AS income_type_name, amount, occur_at, proof_url, source_desc, created_at FROM `income` WHERE club_id = #{clubId} AND YEAR(occur_at) = #{year} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY occur_at DESC

SELECT e.id, e.club_id, e.event_id, e.category, e.amount, e.payee_name, e.payee_account, e.invoice_url, e.expense_desc, e.approve_level, e.expense_status, e.reject_reason, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM `expense` e WHERE e.club_id = #{clubId} AND e.expense_status = 2 AND YEAR(e.created_at) = #{year} AND e.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY e.created_at DESC

SELECT cm.id, cm.club_id, cm.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, cm.position_id, cp.position_name, cm.member_status, cm.join_at, cm.quit_at, cm.contribution_score FROM `club_member` cm JOIN `user` u ON u.id = cm.user_id LEFT JOIN `club_position` cp ON cp.id = cm.position_id AND cp.is_deleted = 0 WHERE cm.club_id = #{clubId} AND cm.member_status = 1 AND cm.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY cm.join_at ASC
SELECT MAX(review_year) FROM `club_review` WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `club_review` WHERE review_year = #{reviewYear} AND review_status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
